"use client"

import { CandlestickChart } from "@/components/ui/charts"

// Stock data with volume
const chartData = [
  { date: "2024-03-01", open: 150, high: 158, low: 148, close: 155, volume: 2500000 },
  { date: "2024-03-04", open: 155, high: 160, low: 152, close: 148, volume: 3200000 },
  { date: "2024-03-05", open: 148, high: 152, low: 145, close: 150, volume: 2800000 },
  { date: "2024-03-06", open: 150, high: 162, low: 148, close: 160, volume: 4100000 },
  { date: "2024-03-07", open: 160, high: 165, low: 158, close: 162, volume: 3500000 },
  { date: "2024-03-08", open: 162, high: 168, low: 160, close: 165, volume: 2900000 },
  { date: "2024-03-11", open: 165, high: 170, low: 162, close: 158, volume: 3800000 },
  { date: "2024-03-12", open: 158, high: 162, low: 155, close: 160, volume: 2600000 },
  { date: "2024-03-13", open: 160, high: 175, low: 158, close: 172, volume: 5200000 },
  { date: "2024-03-14", open: 172, high: 178, low: 170, close: 175, volume: 4800000 },
  { date: "2024-03-15", open: 175, high: 180, low: 172, close: 168, volume: 3900000 },
  { date: "2024-03-18", open: 168, high: 172, low: 165, close: 170, volume: 2700000 },
  { date: "2024-03-19", open: 170, high: 185, low: 168, close: 182, volume: 6100000 },
  { date: "2024-03-20", open: 182, high: 188, low: 180, close: 185, volume: 5500000 },
  { date: "2024-03-21", open: 185, high: 190, low: 182, close: 178, volume: 4200000 },
  { date: "2024-03-22", open: 178, high: 182, low: 175, close: 180, volume: 3100000 },
]

export default function CandlestickChartVolumeDemo() {
  return (
    <CandlestickChart
      data={chartData}
      showGrid
      showTooltip
      showVolume
      aspectRatio={2}
    />
  )
}
